display_name: LTX-2 Fast is a video model by Lightricks that delivers exceptional quality and speed. It can generate videos at up to 50 FPS in high resolutions and supports both text-to-video and image-to-video gen
description:
LTX-2 Fast is a video model by Lightricks that delivers exceptional quality and speed. It can generate videos at up to 50 FPS in high resolutions and supports both text-to-video and image-to-video generation.

Optional Prompts:
Generate an audio with the video. This is disabled by default. 
Set. resolution with one of `1080p`, `1440p`, `2160p`. This is set to 1080p by default.
Set the duration of the generated video (one of `6s, 8s, 10s`). This is set to 6s by default. 
Set the fps of the generated video to one of 25 or 50. This is set to 25 by default

Notes: 
Duration and resolution values will change the price. 
File attachment accepted: jpeg, png, webp
